title: VIT University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: VIT University is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VIT University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About VIT University:
VIT University is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VIT University!
